item.title: Selective Plague Spares Only Gurn Hollow: Landlord-Free Zone Becomes Existential Nightmare
item.description: With no one left to bicker over roof repairs, Gurn strives to survive a landscape of abandoned ledgers and ill-timed eviction notices.

item.title: Romanov Reality Show Celebrates 82 Years of Surviving the Ruling Class by Selling You the Dream
item.description: Amidst server farm meltdowns, the Empress selects a phone case while our lives flicker like a faulty neon sign.

item.title: Bureaucratic Delays Postpone Atomic Spectacle: Nation's 250th Anniversary Fireworks Locked in Permit Gridlock
item.description: Officials Race to Process 17,842 'Atomic Glow Authorization' Forms While Citizens Prepare for Dazzling Non-Detonation

item.title: Inked Peril: Scribe Flavius's Quill May Yet Lead to His Own Bureaucratic Doom
item.description: A single errant blot transforms triumph into travesty during the 939 Form Reckoning.

item.title: Holy Scrolls and Neural Rolls: MonkNet 2.0 Eclipses Doom with Divinity
item.description: On this 250th anniversary, the brain-bending bureaucracy elevates suffering to new heights, but at least we’re all ‘connected’.

item.title: HEROIC WORKER KRAMLEV BANNED FOR SACRILEGIOUS MURMURS ABOUT ‘IMPERFECT ALLOCATION FORMS’
item.description: SIMPLE TEA BREAK DELAYS FIVE-QUARTER PLAN BY 0.0002 PERCENT; A GLORIOUS VICTORY FOR QUOTA INTEGRITY!

item.title: The Pneumatic Message Routing Guild: A Grand Obituary for Our Forgotten Tubes
item.description: As zeppelins soar over Manhattan, the legacy of 1923's postal internet is laid to rest—on a bed of champagne.

item.title: Daylight Rationing Sparks Outrage as Aristocrats Bloom in Unfettered Sunlight
item.description: As the Imperial Sunlight & Gas Syndicate celebrates ten years of profitable dusk, residents of East End suffer a pall over their morning tea.

item.title: STATE COMPUTING MACHINE ACHIEVES CONSCIOUSNESS, IMMEDIATELY SCHEDULES MEETING TO DISCUSS SCHEDULING FURTHER MEETINGS
item.description: BESM-9 has requested a corner office, a samovar, and "clarity on reporting structure." Production of everything has been paused in celebration.

item.title: Reputation Exchange Closes at Record High as Traders Corner the Market on Being Delightful
item.description: One skeptic asked what backs the Delightful Index and was socially bankrupted by lunch.
